rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard sans-serif for headings.
Headings (> 24px) MUST use tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Labels, overlines, and table headers MUST be uppercase, text-xs, with tracking-[0.2em] for technical precision.
Use font-medium or font-semibold for data points to ensure readability.
Never use pure black (#000000) or white (#FFFFFF) for text. Always tint with slate/blue.
Status colors must meet 4.5:1 contrast ratios. On dark mode, use lower lightness variants or add glows.
Primary color (#667eea) is strictly for main CTAs, active states, and key data points.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.

layout.grid_protocol: Mode B (High Density Grid) for Analytics
rules: Mobile-First: Base layout is grid-cols-1, scaling to grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 on desktop.
Gap Strategy: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) between data widgets to ensure dense correlation.
Padding: Containers with borders MUST have p-6 or p-8. No cramped text.
Never center-align paragraphs or tabular data. Left-align for scannability.
DO NOT align the App container to center. Do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.

cards.border: 1px solid border-border. Use 'Grid Borders' concept where adjacent cards align cleanly.
cards.hover: Subtle border color change or -translate-y-[2px] with soft shadow. No heavy neumorphism here.

tabs.customization: Override h-9 to h-auto. Use a sharp, underline-style indicator or flat un-pill-like background for the active tab to look more 'dashboard professional'.

insight_callouts.classes: bg-primary/5 dark:bg-primary/10 border-l-4 border-primary p-4 rounded-r-md flex gap-3 items-start
insight_callouts.usage: Embed 2-3 of these per tab section to provide 'AI' or 'Strategic' insights derived from the data.

rules: Use purpose-driven colors (primary for main metric, slate for comparisons).
Axes lines should be extremely subtle (opacity 0.1 or 0.2).
Tooltips must be custom-styled to match the app theme (dark/light bg, border, sharp text).
Legends MUST be clear and interactive if applicable.

buttons.style: Modern pill-shaped or rounded-md with sharp hover interaction animations.

pages_and_sections.name: Global Header & KPI Top Bar
pages_and_sections.content: 4 Executive KPI Cards (Total Activity Volume, Engagement Quality, Growth Velocity, Opportunity Index). Always visible. Include sparklines.

pages_and_sections.name: Tab 1: Real-Time Overview
pages_and_sections.content: Card grid, live feed/health indicators, active viewers metrics.

pages_and_sections.name: Tab 2: Engagement Analytics Deep Dive
pages_and_sections.content: Scatter plot (views vs engagement), Histogram (distribution), Line chart (retention), Box plot (outliers). Plus insight panel.

pages_and_sections.name: Tab 3: Category & Segment Performance
pages_and_sections.content: Stacked bar (categories), Demographic breakdown (pie/donut), Heatmap (time/day engagement matrix).

pages_and_sections.name: Tab 4: Growth & Opportunity Analysis
pages_and_sections.content: Bar chart (growth over time), Opportunity scores (list/table), Trend predictions (line chart with dotted projection), Emerging matrix (scatter).

pages_and_sections.name: Tab 5: Competitive & Strategic Positioning
pages_and_sections.content: Radar chart (multivariate comparison), Benchmark table (data grid), 2x2 matrix (quadrant chart).

rules: Keep animations minimalist (micro-interactions for feedback).
Use specific transitions (e.g., transition-transform duration-200), NO transition-all.
Stagger list items and charts on initial load.
Add micro-animations for hover states, transitions, entrance animations. Static = dead.

icons_and_assets.rules: Use Lucide React (already installed). Stroke width 1.5 or 2 based on size. Keep it clean and utilitarian. NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.

data_and_backend_strategy.api: YouTube API v3 via FastAPI backend.
data_and_backend_strategy.database: MongoDB for caching/storing historical points to compute velocity/trends.
data_and_backend_strategy.fallback: MUST have a simulated data mode if API limit is hit or credentials missing.
data_and_backend_strategy.refresh: Live data refresh with UI timestamps.

universal_main_agent_rules: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the mold: use the specified typography and tight layout to make it feel like a premium Bloomberg terminal or high-end internal tool.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Create new components using named exports, Pages MUST use default exports. Follow .js/.jsx standards as ts/tsx is not strictly used unless configured.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='kpi-card-velocity').
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Use sonner for toasts. The component is typically at /app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js
Implement system preference detection for dark/light mode via standard React context/providers.
Load time < 2 seconds: Ensure data fetching is optimized and chart rendering is lazy or memoized where appropriate.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where necessary, but not flat transparents.
